figures.caption: Figure 3: AUROC and F1 scores for the top 10 ICD-10 codes.
Figure 2: Per-code AUROC results for the 10 topperforming ICD-10 codes under full finetuning.

Figure 1: LAMAE architecture overview. During pretraining (left), masked frames from multiple views are encoded and fused through the Latent Attention (LA) module to learn shared representations, which are used to reconstruct full frames. During finetuning (right), frames are processed through that same encoder and LA module, followed by a lightweight classification head.
